name: Cohen & Co Inc.
business: Cohen & Co Inc. is a financial services company specializing in capital markets and asset management services. Its Capital Markets segment provides sales, trading, underwriting, advisory, and SPAC advisory services. The Asset Management segment manages investment vehicles such as funds and CDOs.

exposures.sentence: CCM is one of the most active SPAC advisors on Wall Street with differentiated and inventive products for clients, and a focus on frontier technologies, digital assets, energy transition, and natural resources.

catalysts.event: Columbus Circle Capital Corp. II completed $230 million IPO
catalysts.sentence: Our fifth sponsored SPAC, Columbus Circle Capital Corp. II (NASDAQ: CMIIU), completed its $230 million IPO in February 2026.
